title: make-no-mistakes cross-cutting hooks — per-repo config
description: Per-repo configuration for the toolkit's Cure 4b cross-cutting PreToolUse hooks. Lives at the consumer-repo root as .claude/config/cross-cutting-hooks.json. File absence → all 4b hooks no-op (opt-in). legacy-ticket.

$schema.description: Pin the schema version for editor autocomplete and CI validation.

version.description: Schema version. Mandatory. Hooks fail-open with a stderr warning on unknown versions.

enabled.description: Master switch for this surface. False (or missing) → hook no-ops.

defer_to_local_hook.description: Belt-and-braces: when true, this 4b hook fail-opens with an info-stderr message because a tighter local 4a hook owns enforcement for this surface in this repo.

extra_block_patterns.description: ERE regexes for additional env-var name patterns to treat as high-impact secrets. Appended to the built-in pattern set.

extra_cure_suffixes.description: Additional env-var name suffixes (e.g. _REF, _VOLUME) treated as evidence of the secret-volume cure pattern. Placeholders ending in any of these suffixes are allowed. Built-in defaults: _FILE, _PATH.

enabled.description: Master switch. False (or missing) → hook no-ops.

defer_to_local_hook.description: Belt-and-braces flag — same semantics as cleartext_secrets.

owned_tables.description: Table names this repo legitimately migrates. Empty array combined with non-empty migration_paths → every write under those paths is blocked (the gateway-plugin pattern, where the repo has no migration pipeline at all).

migration_paths.description: Path globs treated as migration directories. A Write/Edit inside any of these triggers ownership checking against owned_tables.

version_bumps.description: Configures pre-write-version-bump-discipline.sh. Each entry guards one file pattern + delegates to one validator script.

file_pattern.description: Basename pattern (case-sensitive). Supports trailing-component glob, e.g. 'Dockerfile', '**/Dockerfile', 'package.json'.

version_regex.description: ERE regex with a single capturing group that extracts the version literal from a matching line of the file content. Example: 'openclaw/releases/download/(v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+)/'.

validator_script.description: Path (relative to the consumer-repo root) of an executable script. Invoked with two arguments: <old_version> <new_version>. Exit 2 → 4b hook blocks. Exit 0 → 4b hook passes. Any other exit code → 4b hook warns and fail-opens.

validator_args.description: Optional extra args passed after old_version + new_version.

defer_to_local_hook.description: Belt-and-braces flag — per-entry. true → this entry's 4b enforcement defers to the local 4a hook.
